overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair navigating neon-lit urban alleys at night. The character walks through narrow corridors with shifting red and cyan neon lighting, passes various NPCs, and descends to a flooded lower level filled with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with storage boxes and metal shutters

events.description: character turns around and begins walking forward
character starts following a man in white shirt

agents.ego_description: character with blue hair turns and follows a man in white shirt through the narrow alley

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: stack of white cardboard boxes against the wall
corrugated metal security shutters on building facade
glowing red and cyan neon lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow alley with the blue-haired player character turning to follow a man in white. Cardboard boxes and metal shutters line the walls while neon lights glow in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet alley with red neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant red neon as character enters narrower corridor
passes a group of people gathered around someone on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through wet alley passing NPCs gathered on the right side

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing around a person lying on the wet ground

entered.detail: metal barrel with fire providing warm orange light
intense red neon strips illuminating the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the alley where red neon lights dominate the atmosphere. The ground is wet and reflective, and a group of NPCs stands around someone on the ground near a burning barrel.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway with red ambient lighting

events.description: character walks past three people standing in the corridor
character reaches end of walkway and turns around to head back

agents.ego_description: walking down metal walkway passing NPCs and then turning around at the end

notable_agents.action: three people standing together, one in red outfit looking at a device

entered.detail: grated metal flooring with visible gaps and reflective surface
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along an elevated metal walkway with red ambient lighting, passing three NPCs standing together. Tall buildings with lights are visible at the far end before the character turns around to return.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with hanging lanterns and signage

events.description: lighting changes from red to teal/cyan as character returns to main alley
passes under large COLA sign and paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking back through the main alley passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward the player

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'COLA' text hanging above the alley
traditional-style paper lanterns hanging in a row above the street
walls covered with various colorful posters and advertisements
external AC units mounted on the building walls

segments.scene_description: Returning through the main alley, the lighting shifts to teal and cyan tones. The character passes under a large COLA sign and paper lanterns, with poster-covered walls on the left and various pedestrians walking through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley opening to street then descending to lower level

events.description: character approaches opening to busy street then turns back toward interior
character descends metal stairs into flooded lower level

agents.ego_description: approaching street opening then turning back and descending stairs to lower level

notable_agents.action: group of people gathered near a burning barrel

entered.detail: view of busy illuminated street with crowds and vehicles in the distance
metal staircase leading down to a lower flooded level
water-covered ground with reflective surface at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an opening revealing a busy street ahead, then turns back into the alley. Passing the group near the burning barrel again, the character descends metal stairs into a flooded lower level with debris scattered about.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded lower alley with trash and neon signs

events.description: moving through debris-filled flooded area with dumpsters
entering more populated area with multiple pedestrians and bright neon signs

agents.ego_description: navigating through trash-filled flooded alley toward a more populated area with stairs

notable_agents.action: person in bright green jacket walking ahead
person standing near neon vending machine

entered.detail: large green dumpsters with open lids filled with trash
vending machine with bright red neon outline
large illuminated advertisement screen on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a flooded lower alley filled with debris and dumpsters. Neon signs illuminate the area as the character approaches a more populated section with other pedestrians and a staircase visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban alleyway that transitions from narrow, red-hued corridors to a flooded subterranean level. It begins with the blue-haired character following a man past cardboard boxes and metal shutters, moving deeper into the alley as the atmosphere shifts to a dominant red glow over wet, reflective ground and a burning barrel. The camera then tracks the character along an elevated metal walkway before turning back through the main alley, where the lighting transforms into teal and cyan tones beneath a large COLA sign and glowing paper lanterns. After passing through a brief opening to a busy street, the character returns to the alley and descends a set of metal stairs. The scene finally opens into a flooded lower level filled with debris and dumpsters, illuminated by neon signs as the character approaches a populated section with a distant staircase.
